summary: Iteration 3 frontend-only verification of Butler AI visual unification overhaul on the Expo SDK 53 web preview at EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL with all 7 onboarding flags pre-seeded in localStorage. All 8 tabs (HOME, SCRIPTS, AI, KB, PC, BUILD, SKINS, CONFIG) navigate and render successfully WITHOUT crash / SYSTEM FAULT error boundary / blank screen after the mass color palette change. Home hero correctly shows BUTLER AI SVG logo with NO version-number pill (verified by regex scan of hero region text). QUICK ACCESS section now sits IMMEDIATELY below the hero (Y=443.5) and BEFORE Quick Send (Y=715) — order corrected as requested. All 4 Quick Access tiles (quick-access-scripts/butler/knowledge/fileshare) are present; the fileshare tile successfully navigates to the hidden /fileshare route without crashing. QuickButlerBar (52px compact) renders with testIDs quickbar-input + quickbar-send and successfully navigates to /butler after typing+send. Security Protocols grid renders 6 icon cells with the new MaterialCommunityIcons (shield-key/AES-256 ENCRYPT, eye-off/NO TRAFFIC TRACKING, robot-angry/100% PRIVATE & LOCAL, cloud-off/NO CLOUD STORAGE, server-security/LOCAL-HOSTED DATA, account-cancel/NO ACCOUNT REQUIRED) — NO '?' / missing-icon placeholders detected in section text scan. Tab bar renders the new themed top edge (steel+neon, plateau notch, hazard dashes visible in screenshot) and all 8 robot-themed MaterialCommunityIcons render correctly (no '?' placeholder boxes). 0 console errors related to undefined styles/colors on any tab. Only console warnings observed are pre-existing benign RN Web deprecation notices (shadow*/textShadow*/pointerEvents, useNativeDriver, kbGrowthTracker documentDirectory) — unchanged from iteration 2.
action_items: No action items required for this iteration — visual unification, Quick Access reorder, tab bar retheme, robot icon set, Security grid icon swap, version-pill removal, and QuickButlerBar compact 52px all verified working with zero regressions.
(Carried over from iteration 2, still recommended) Split nexushome.tsx (>1700 lines) into smaller per-section components under /components/home/* to stay under the 700-line guideline.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero in nexushome.tsx (lines 408–419) contains a pillRow with exactly 2 status pills (LOCAL MODE + OLLAMA LOCAL) — no version pill, consistent with the spec.

nexushome.tsx render order (lines 1640–1644) correctly pins ButlerAIHero then QuickAccessGrid BEFORE the config-driven cards.map block which now filters out 'hero' and 'quick_access' ids to avoid double rendering — clean implementation.

FuturisticTabBar.tsx still correctly assigns (global as any).__butlerSwitchTab via useEffect with cleanup; TAB_ALIASES still maps fileshare → fileshare so Quick Access deep-links into the hidden route.

Tab bar successfully renders all 8 routes with data-testid=tab-{routeName} (nexushome/scripts/butler/knowledge/logs/builder/skins/settings). The robot-themed icons (view-dashboard-variant, code-braces-box, robot-happy, head-cog-outline, desktop-tower-monitor, hammer-screwdriver, palette-swatch-outline, cog-box) all resolve in the MaterialCommunityIcons web font (no '?' boxes).

Security Protocols grid icons swap is complete and all 6 MaterialCommunityIcons resolve correctly in the web font — visible in the screenshot with proper colored shield/eye/robot/cloud/server/account glyphs.

success_rate.frontend: 8/8 tabs load without crash (100%). Home hero version-pill removal: PASS. Quick Access reorder (above Quick Send): PASS. Quick Access tiles 4/4 present + fileshare deep-link no crash: PASS. QuickButlerBar input+send → /butler: PASS. Security grid 6/6 icons render (no '?' placeholders): PASS. Tab bar themed top edge + 8/8 robot icons render: PASS. Console errors on style/color/undefined: 0.

seed_data_creation: Seeded the 7 onboarding flags in localStorage (@butler_onboarding_done_v2, @butler_consent_v2, @butler_terms_accepted_v1, @butler_privacy_accepted_v1, @butler_age_confirmed_v1, @butler_lan_consent_v1, @butler_server_privacy_accepted_v1) = '1' as instructed, then reloaded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 visual unification verified clean. All 8 tabs at /nexushome, /scripts, /butler, /knowledge, /logs, /builder, /skins, /settings render without SYSTEM FAULT. testIDs in use: tab-{routeName}, hero-scan-qr, quick-access-{scripts|butler|knowledge|fileshare}, quickbar-input, quickbar-send, qsend-{clipboard|text|file}. Expo dev server runs with CI=true (file-watch OFF) — restart with `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` after edits and wait ~20s. Butler tab still has a one-time 'BUTLER AI Local AI Behavioral Notice' modal blocker on first entry (expected, not a bug).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration.
